report_name: Accenture and ServiceNow Launch AI-Powered Risk Management Platform

identities.name: Accenture
identities.description: A global professional services company that partnered with ServiceNow to launch a new joint offering for enterprise risk management. Accenture provides AI-powered managed security services and an automated migration solution as part of the collaboration.

identities.name: ServiceNow
identities.description: A cloud platform provider that partnered with Accenture to launch a new joint offering for enterprise risk management. ServiceNow provides the core AI Platform for the solution.

identities.name: IDC MarketScape
identities.description: A market research firm that named Accenture a Leader in Worldwide Cybersecurity Governance, Risk, and Compliance (GRC) Consulting Services, validating the strength of the Accenture-ServiceNow partnership.
